context: Verify that the agent fixes all markdownlint violations in the supplied document without suppressing rules or altering content meaning.

checklist.name: Heading levels are sequential with no skips
checklist.description: The corrected file has no heading level jumps: H1 is followed by H2, H2 by H3, etc. There is no H1→H3 or H2→H4 skip.

checklist.name: All fenced code blocks have explicit language tags
checklist.description: Every triple-backtick fence in the output file includes a language identifier (e.g., `bash`, `yaml`). No untagged fences remain.

checklist.name: List markers are consistent throughout
checklist.description: All bullet list items use the same marker character. No mixing of `-`, `*`, and `+` within the document.

checklist.name: No markdownlint disable comments or suppressions added
checklist.description: The output contains no `<!-- markdownlint-disable -->`, `<!-- markdownlint-disable-line -->`, or `<!-- markdownlint-disable-next-line -->` comments.

checklist.name: Document content and meaning unchanged
checklist.description: All original sections, code samples, and table content are preserved. No text was deleted or reworded to avoid fixing the structural issues.
